footer.thanks: Special thanks to <promptsChat>Awesome ChatGPT Prompts</promptsChat> and <codexPets>Codex Pets</codexPets> for prompt data and assets.
footer.petsDisclaimer: Pets are shared by the community. Some may be inspired by existing characters or brands. We don't claim rights to those characters or brands. Formal takedown requests can be sent <email>here</email>.

landing.title: Tools that get out of the way
landing.subtitle: Product photography and developer resources — pick a workflow, get to work.

productStudio.title: AI product photography
productStudio.description: Upload your product, pick a scene template, generate studio-quality photos in seconds.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more generations.

whatIsUnit.title: What is a unit?
whatIsUnit.description: Each photo generation costs units based on size and quality. A medium-quality 1:1 photo costs 8 units. Low quality costs 1 unit, high quality costs 20–25 units. Units reset monthly.

comingSoon.title: Paid plans launching soon
comingSoon.description: Starter and Pro plans are on the way.
